info.title: Kisara API
info.description: API documentation untuk layanan kisara.my.id (generated otomatis dari route schemas).

bearerAuth.description: Internal web-session JWT, used only for session-based account actions and API key management.

apiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
apiKeyAuth.description: Consumer-facing API authentication. Use this for protected User/Message endpoints.

get.description: Internal frontend login flow: returns Google OAuth consent URL.

post.description: Internal frontend login flow: exchange authorization code and issue JWT web-session tokens.

get.description: Google redirect handler for web login: exchanges authorization code, sets auth cookies, and redirects to frontend dashboard.

post.description: Internal web-session flow: validate refresh token and issue new JWT pair.
Create a new API key for consumer API access. Requires authenticated web session.

get.description: Returns all API keys owned by the authenticated user.

delete.description: Revoke an API key owned by the authenticated user.

tags.name: Auth (Internal Web Session)
tags.description: Internal web session flows (OAuth callback and JWT refresh). Not intended for API consumers.

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: API key management for authenticated users. Use generated keys for programmatic API access.
